Name: Hydrology and Water Quality Assessment
Description: Field assessment of Jordan Creek water temperature and redband trout habitat. Reviews proposed water withdrawal points and 50-foot buffer design. CWA Category 4A impairment coordination. Closure triggers IDWR co-permit task.

Name: Sage-Grouse Lek and PHMA Survey
Description: Priority Habitat Management Area survey and 3.1-mile lek buffer verification per Idaho ARMPA. Must complete February 1 through April 30 before nesting season. Tightest seasonal window.

Name: Columbia Spotted Frog and Riparian Survey
Description: Riparian corridor survey along Jordan Creek. Columbia spotted frog habitat assessment and steep-shoreline pond design review. Requires active amphibian season May through September.

Name: Migratory Bird Nesting Survey
Description: Nesting bird territory mapping on 15-acre footprint and 1.7-mile access corridor. Must complete before mid-April OR schedule after late July per MBTA and sage-grouse ARMPA.

Name: Big Game Winter Range Assessment
Description: Mule deer crucial winter range overlap mapping for T. 6 S. R. 5 W. Sec. 28. Shoulder season August through October required before winter range activation per BLM seasonal use mapping.

Name: Geology Soils and Access Road Assessment
Description: 1.7-mile access road erosion assessment. Cadastral survey boundary review. Reclamation plan technical review and bond amount recommendation. Closure triggers EPA NPDES NOI task.

Name: Botanical and Special Status Plant Survey
Description: Special status plant survey across 15-acre disturbance footprint and access corridor. Reclamation seed mix approval. BLM Manual requires minimum two site visits during peak identification season June through August.
